subject: (no subject)
body:
another idea for obama . not as good as bio signal intelligence. . the cinese are willing to build a new collider. they will put up the money and build it , but need american tech. if he were to call it the obama xi collider. his legazy would be great in scinece and the project takes 15 -30 years.
